description: Tests page improvements: Replace star difficulty indicator with creative non-confusing symbols (signal bars or gauge), add test cover image display with colorful gradient fallback if no image, implement category filtering (DTM, Maktab, Attestatsiya, etc.), and fix search functionality to filter by category type.
steps: 1. Update prisma/schema.prisma: Add 'coverImage String?' field to Test model. Run prisma generate.

2. Update src/app/[locale]/(main)/tests/page.tsx: Replace Star icons for difficulty with signal-bar/gauge icons (use custom SVG or Lucide 'Signal' icon with filled bars 1-5). This avoids confusion with user ratings.

3. Update tests/page.tsx: Add test cover image display in each test card. If test.coverImage exists show it, otherwise show a colorful gradient background based on test difficulty or subject (use predefined gradient array).

4. Update tests/page.tsx: Make category filter buttons actually filter tests. Currently activeCategory state changes but filteredTests only filters by search. Add category filtering: fetch tests with ?type=category parameter or filter client-side by matching test category type.
5. Update src/app/api/tests/route.ts: Add 'type' query parameter support to filter tests by TestType (DTM, SCHOOL, ATTESTATION, etc.). Join with TestCategory to filter by type.
6. Update tests/page.tsx: When a category button is clicked, re-fetch tests with the category type filter (or filter from already-fetched data by adding category info to the API response).
7. Update src/app/[locale]/(teacher)/teacher/tests/create/page.tsx: Add cover image upload field in the test info step, using the existing ImageUploadButton component.
8. Update src/app/api/tests/route.ts POST: Accept and save coverImage field when creating a test.
9. Update src/app/api/tests/[id]/route.ts PUT: Accept and save coverImage field when updating a test.
acceptance_criteria: Difficulty shown with signal bars or gauge (not stars) in test cards
Test cards show cover image or colorful gradient fallback
Category buttons (DTM, Maktab, Attestatsiya, SAT, GRE, Sertifikat) filter tests correctly
Search still works and combines with category filter
Teacher can upload cover image when creating test
findings: Build passes successfully. Signal bars use inline styles for height (6px to 18px) with 3px width. Category filtering works by querying TestCategory records that match the TestType enum value and filtering tests by those category IDs. Cover image upload reuses the existing ImageUploadButton component with endpoint 'questionImage'. The PUT handler was refactored to only update fields that are explicitly provided in the request body (avoids nulling out fields on partial updates like isPublished toggle).
